meaning: adj.紫外线的,紫外的n.紫外线辐射
examples: Exposure to ultraviolet light is closely linked to skin cancer.
The ozone layer shields the earth from the sun's ultraviolet rays.
Ozone is produced by the reaction between oxygen and ultraviolet light.
The UltraViolet logo on the packaging of the device would assure the customer, it is compliant.
An intern's eyes were harmed by the incorrect use of a pulsed ultraviolet laser.
